external_references.description: Gallagher, S., Gn, S. (2020, December 16). Ransomware operators use SystemBC RAT as off-the-shelf Tor backdoor. Retrieved May 16, 2025.
Truman, D. (2024, January 19). Inside the SYSTEMBC Command-and-Control Server. Retrieved June 18, 2025.

objects.description: [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has executed a copy of itself as a scheduled task with the `start` command. The copy of [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has random file and directory names within the ProgramData directory.(Citation: SophosGnGal_SystemBC_Dec2020)(Citation: TrumanKroll_SYSTEMBCServer_Jan2024)
